seoTitle: Mean Well Power Supplies - Product Catalog | BeiLuo Distributor
seoDescription: Browse Mean Well AC-DC power supplies, DC-DC converters, LED drivers, and medical power supplies. Technical specifications, pricing, and availability from authorized distributor.

faqs.question: What are the most popular Mean Well power supply series?
faqs.answer: Mean Well's most popular series include the LRS series for cost-effective enclosed power supplies (35-600W), the RS series for high-performance industrial applications (15-150W), the HLG series for outdoor LED lighting (40-600W), and the RSP series for high-power industrial applications (75-500W). For medical applications, the GSM and RPS series are widely used. The SD series offers reliable DIN rail mount power supplies for industrial control panels. Each series is optimized for specific applications with appropriate features, certifications, and price points. Our sales team can help you select the best series for your requirements based on power rating, environmental conditions, and certification needs.

faqs.question: How do I cross-reference Mean Well part numbers?
faqs.answer: Mean Well uses a systematic part numbering convention that indicates series, power rating, and output voltage. For example, in LRS-350-24: LRS is the series, 350 indicates 350W power rating, and 24 indicates 24V output. The HLG-240H-48A indicates HLG series, 240W, 48V output, high input voltage range (H), and adjustable current (A). When cross-referencing competitor products, compare input voltage range, output voltage/current, power rating, efficiency, dimensions, and safety certifications. Our FAE team can assist with cross-referencing and provide comparison datasheets.

faqs.question: What is the difference between constant voltage and constant current LED drivers?
faqs.answer: Constant voltage (CV) LED drivers maintain a fixed output voltage (typically 12V or 24V) and the current varies based on the LED load. They're suitable for LED strips and modules with built-in current regulation. Constant current (CC) drivers maintain a fixed output current (e.g., 700mA, 1050mA) and the voltage varies to maintain that current. CC drivers are required for high-power LEDs and fixtures without internal regulation. Mean Well offers both types: the LPV and LPF series are constant voltage, while the HLG and XLG series offer both CV and CC versions.

faqs.question: Can Mean Well power supplies be connected in parallel for higher power?
faqs.answer: Many Mean Well power supplies support parallel operation for increased power capacity or redundancy. Series with built-in parallel capability include the RSP-750/1000/1500/2000/3000, RST-5000/7500/15000, and DRP series. These models feature active current sharing that automatically balances load between units. For redundancy applications, the DR-RDN20 or DR-RDN40 redundancy modules can be used with compatible power supplies.

categories.name: AC-DC Enclosed Power Supplies
categories.description: High-efficiency enclosed switching power supplies for industrial and commercial applications
categories.longDescription: Mean Well's AC-DC enclosed power supplies offer reliable, cost-effective solutions for industrial automation, LED lighting, and commercial equipment. The LRS series provides excellent value for general applications with high efficiency and compact size. The RSP series delivers higher power with active PFC and parallel operation capability for demanding industrial systems. All models feature universal AC input, comprehensive protection, and long lifespan with 3-5 year warranties.

products.protection: Short Circuit, Overload, Over Voltage, Over Temperature
products.shortDescription: 350W 24V enclosed switching power supply with 89% efficiency and universal AC input
descriptionParagraphs: The LRS-350-24 is a 350W enclosed switching power supply delivering 24VDC at 14.6A. It features universal AC input (85-264VAC), making it suitable for worldwide applications.

With 89% efficiency and a compact 215 x 115 x 50mm package, it provides excellent power density for industrial applications. The LRS series is Mean Well's cost-effective solution for general-purpose power requirements.

Comprehensive protection features include short circuit, overload, over voltage, and over temperature protection. The -30°C to +70°C operating temperature range ensures reliable operation in various environments.

faeReview.author: Michael Chen
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - Industrial Power
faeReview.content: The LRS-350-24 is my go-to recommendation for 24V industrial applications up to 350W. It offers excellent value with reliable performance. I've deployed hundreds of these in factory automation projects with minimal failures. The key is proper ventilation - ensure 50mm clearance around the unit. The 3-year warranty reflects the quality. For cost-sensitive applications where basic protection is sufficient, this is an excellent choice.
faeReview.highlight: Cost-effective 350W supply with universal input and comprehensive protection

products.protection: Short Circuit, Overload, Over Voltage, Over Temperature
products.shortDescription: 750W 48V high-performance power supply with active PFC and parallel capability
descriptionParagraphs: The RSP-750-48 is a 750W high-performance enclosed power supply delivering 48VDC at 15.7A. It features active PFC (Power Factor Correction) and built-in parallel operation capability.
With 93% efficiency and advanced features like current sharing, it's ideal for demanding industrial applications requiring high reliability and redundancy options.
The -40°C to +70°C operating range and 5-year warranty make it suitable for critical applications. Built-in remote sense and DC OK signal enable advanced system monitoring.

faeReview.author: David Zhang
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - High Power Systems
faeReview.content: The RSP-750-48 is a workhorse for high-power industrial applications. The active PFC ensures compliance with international harmonic standards. I've used these in parallel configurations for 1500W+ systems with excellent current sharing. The remote sense feature compensates for voltage drop in long cable runs. For mission-critical applications, the 5-year warranty and 300K hour MTBF provide peace of mind. The DC OK signal is essential for system monitoring.
faeReview.highlight: High-performance 750W supply with active PFC and parallel operation

products.protection: Short Circuit, Overload, Over Voltage, Over Temperature
products.shortDescription: 450W 24V enclosed power supply with compact size and cost-effective design
descriptionParagraphs: The SE-450-24 is a 450W enclosed switching power supply delivering 24VDC at 18.8A. It offers a compact footprint with good efficiency for general industrial applications.
With 88% efficiency and universal AC input, it provides reliable power for automation equipment, LED lighting, and test systems. The compact 199 x 110 x 50mm size saves panel space.
Standard protection features include short circuit, overload, over voltage, and over temperature protection. The SE series offers excellent value for cost-sensitive applications.

faeReview.author: Li Wei
faeReview.title: FAE - Power Systems
faeReview.content: The SE-450-24 fills the gap between LRS and RSP series. It offers more power than LRS-350 in a similar footprint. I recommend this for applications needing 400-450W where RSP features aren't required. The 2-year warranty is shorter than premium series, but reliability is still good for standard industrial use. Good for LED lighting projects and small automation systems.

products.protection: Short Circuit, Overload, Over Voltage, Over Temperature
products.shortDescription: 600W 12V enclosed power supply with high current output for LED and industrial applications
descriptionParagraphs: The LRS-600-12 is a 600W enclosed switching power supply delivering 12VDC at 50A. It's the highest power model in the LRS series, ideal for high-current 12V applications.
With 88% efficiency and the same compact footprint as lower power LRS models, it offers excellent power density. The 50A output current supports large LED installations and industrial loads.
Universal AC input and comprehensive protection make it suitable for worldwide deployment. The 3-year warranty ensures reliable operation in demanding applications.

faeReview.author: Michael Chen
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - Industrial Power
faeReview.content: The LRS-600-12 is perfect for large 12V LED installations and high-current industrial applications. The 50A output can power extensive LED strips or multiple industrial devices. Same compact size as LRS-350 makes it easy to upgrade existing systems. Good efficiency for the power level. Ensure adequate ventilation at full load - the unit runs warm but within spec.

categories.name: LED Drivers
categories.description: High-efficiency LED drivers for indoor, outdoor, and specialty lighting applications
categories.longDescription: Mean Well offers the industry's most comprehensive range of LED drivers, from indoor constant voltage models to outdoor IP67-rated constant current drivers. The HLG series is the flagship outdoor driver family, featuring high efficiency up to 96%, wide input voltage range (90-305VAC), and multiple dimming options. These drivers are designed for reliability in harsh outdoor environments with 7-year warranties and surge protection up to 6kV.

products.shortDescription: 240W 48V outdoor LED driver with IP67 rating and 95% efficiency
descriptionParagraphs: The HLG-240H-48A is a 240W outdoor LED driver delivering 48V constant voltage output. It features IP67 protection for harsh outdoor environments and 95% efficiency.
With universal 90-305VAC input, it's suitable for worldwide deployment. Multiple dimming options (0-10V, PWM, DALI) enable smart lighting control and energy savings.
Built-in 6kV surge protection and 7-year warranty ensure long-term reliability. The -40°C to +70°C operating range handles extreme weather conditions.

faeReview.author: David Zhang
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - LED Lighting
faeReview.content: The HLG-240H-48A is the gold standard for outdoor LED lighting. The IP67 rating and surge protection make it ideal for street lighting and parking lots. I've seen these run 10+ years in harsh environments. The 95% efficiency reduces operating costs significantly. Multiple dimming options provide flexibility - I recommend DALI for smart city applications. The 7-year warranty reflects the exceptional quality. Always add external surge protection in lightning-prone areas for extra safety.

products.shortDescription: 320W 48V high-power outdoor LED driver with 96% efficiency
descriptionParagraphs: The HLG-320H-48A is a 320W outdoor LED driver delivering 48V at 6.7A. With 96% efficiency, it's one of the most efficient drivers in its class.
The higher power output supports larger LED installations while maintaining the same compact form factor as lower power HLG models. IP67 rating ensures reliable outdoor operation.
Advanced features include active PFC, multiple dimming options, and built-in surge protection. The 7-year warranty and -40°C to +70°C range make it ideal for demanding outdoor applications.

faeReview.author: David Zhang
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - LED Lighting
faeReview.content: The HLG-320H-48A offers exceptional efficiency at 96% - among the best in the industry. The extra power supports larger LED arrays without needing multiple drivers. I use these for high-mast lighting and large area illumination. The active PFC ensures compliance with utility requirements. Same reliable HLG platform with higher output. Excellent for reducing installation complexity in large projects.

products.shortDescription: 60W 24V indoor LED driver with dimming for commercial lighting
descriptionParagraphs: The LPF-60D-24 is a 60W indoor LED driver delivering 24V constant voltage. It's designed for commercial and residential LED lighting applications.
With 90% efficiency and 0-10V/PWM dimming, it provides energy-efficient lighting with smooth dimming control. The compact size fits in standard lighting fixtures.
IP30 rating is suitable for indoor use. The -30°C to +70°C range handles various indoor environments. 3-year warranty ensures reliable operation.

faeReview.author: Chen Wei
faeReview.title: FAE - LED Systems
faeReview.content: The LPF-60D-24 is perfect for indoor LED fixtures and downlights. The 24V output works well with LED strips and modules. Dimming performance is smooth with no flicker. I recommend this for office lighting, retail, and residential applications. The compact size fits most fixtures. Good value for indoor applications where IP67 isn't needed.

products.shortDescription: 240W outdoor LED driver with adjustable output voltage and high efficiency
descriptionParagraphs: The ELG-240-48A is a 240W outdoor LED driver with adjustable 24-48V output. It provides flexibility for various LED configurations while maintaining high efficiency.
With 94% efficiency and IP67 protection, it offers reliable outdoor performance. The adjustable output voltage allows optimization for different LED loads.
Built-in 0-10V and PWM dimming enables smart lighting control. The 5-year warranty and -40°C to +70°C range ensure long-term reliability in outdoor environments.

faeReview.author: David Zhang
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - LED Lighting
faeReview.content: The ELG-240-48A offers great flexibility with adjustable output voltage. This is useful when LED configurations vary by project. The efficiency is excellent at 94%. IP67 rating handles outdoor conditions well. I use these for architectural lighting and sign illumination where voltage requirements vary. The 5-year warranty is solid for most applications.

categories.name: DC-DC Converters
categories.description: Isolated and non-isolated DC-DC converters for industrial and railway applications
categories.longDescription: Mean Well's DC-DC converters provide reliable voltage conversion for industrial control systems, railway applications, and battery-powered equipment. The SD series offers isolated converters for control panels, while the RSD series provides railway-certified solutions. These converters feature wide input ranges, high efficiency, and robust protection for demanding industrial environments.

products.shortDescription: 50W isolated DC-DC converter with 24V output for industrial control panels
descriptionParagraphs: The SD-50B-24 is a 50W isolated DC-DC converter delivering 24V from 19-36V input. It's designed for industrial control panels and distributed power systems.
With 91% efficiency and 1500VDC isolation, it provides clean, isolated power for sensitive circuits. The compact size fits standard DIN rail mounting.
Wide input range handles battery systems and varying DC bus voltages. Protection features include short circuit, overload, and over voltage protection.

faeReview.author: Michael Chen
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - Industrial Power
faeReview.content: The SD-50B-24 is essential for isolating sensitive circuits in control panels. The 1500V isolation prevents ground loops and noise coupling. I use these to power analog circuits, PLCs, and communication modules separately from noisy power sections. The 91% efficiency is excellent for DC-DC. Compact size fits crowded panels. Reliable workhorse for industrial applications.

products.shortDescription: 100W isolated DC-DC converter with 48V input and 24V output
descriptionParagraphs: The SD-100C-24 is a 100W isolated DC-DC converter delivering 24V from 36-72V input. It's ideal for 48V battery systems and telecom applications.
With 92% efficiency and 1500VDC isolation, it provides reliable power conversion for industrial and communication equipment. The 100W output supports larger loads.
Wide 36-72V input range accommodates varying battery voltages and 48V nominal systems. Comprehensive protection ensures reliable operation.

faeReview.author: Michael Chen
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - Industrial Power
faeReview.content: The SD-100C-24 is perfect for 48V to 24V conversion in telecom and industrial applications. The higher power supports multiple devices from a single converter. 92% efficiency minimizes heat generation. I use these in battery backup systems and 48V distributed power architectures. The wide input range handles battery voltage variations well.

products.shortDescription: 30W railway-certified DC-DC converter with 5V output for train applications
descriptionParagraphs: The RSD-30G-5 is a 30W railway-certified DC-DC converter delivering 5V from 9-36V input. It's designed for rolling stock and railway applications.
With EN 50155 certification and 3000VDC isolation, it meets stringent railway safety requirements. The -40°C to +85°C range handles extreme onboard temperatures.
Compact size and high reliability make it ideal for train control systems, passenger information systems, and onboard electronics.

faeReview.author: Dr. Liu Wei
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - Railway Systems
faeReview.content: The RSD-30G-5 is purpose-built for railway applications. The EN 50155 certification is essential for rolling stock approval. 3000V isolation provides excellent safety. I've used these in train control systems and passenger information displays. The wide temperature range handles harsh onboard environments. Reliable performance in vibration and shock conditions typical of railway applications.

products.shortDescription: 150W isolated DC-DC converter with 12V output for high-current applications
descriptionParagraphs: The SD-150B-12 is a 150W isolated DC-DC converter delivering 12V at 12.5A from 19-36V input. It's designed for high-current industrial applications.
With 93% efficiency and 1500VDC isolation, it provides efficient, isolated power for demanding loads. The 12.5A output supports motors, actuators, and high-power electronics.
Wide input range and comprehensive protection make it suitable for battery systems and variable DC sources. Compact size fits industrial enclosures.

faeReview.author: Michael Chen
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - Industrial Power
faeReview.content: The SD-150B-12 provides high-current 12V from 24V systems. The 12.5A output can drive motors and high-power devices. 93% efficiency is excellent for this power level. I use these for actuator power, motor drives, and high-current electronics in 24V control systems. The isolation protects sensitive control circuits from motor noise. Good thermal performance at full load.

categories.name: Medical Power Supplies
categories.description: IEC 60601-1 compliant power supplies for medical devices and healthcare equipment
categories.longDescription: Mean Well's medical power supplies meet stringent IEC 60601-1 safety standards with 2xMOPP isolation and ultra-low leakage current. The GSM series offers compact encapsulated supplies for portable equipment, while the RPS series provides higher power for fixed installations. These supplies are suitable for patient contact applications with BF rating and comprehensive safety certifications.

products.shortDescription: 60W medical power supply with 2xMOPP isolation and BF rating for patient contact
descriptionParagraphs: The GSM60A24-P1J is a 60W medical power supply delivering 24V with 2xMOPP isolation. It meets IEC 60601-1 3rd edition requirements for medical equipment.
With <100µA leakage current and 4000VAC isolation, it's suitable for patient contact applications with BF rating. The compact encapsulated design fits portable equipment.
Universal AC input and -40°C to +85°C range support worldwide deployment. Comprehensive safety certifications include UL, CE, and CB for medical applications.

faeReview.author: Dr. Sarah Liu
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - Medical Systems
faeReview.content: The GSM60A24-P1J is my first choice for low-power medical devices. The 2xMOPP isolation and <100µA leakage current meet strict patient safety requirements. I've used these in patient monitors, infusion pumps, and diagnostic equipment. The compact size is perfect for portable devices. First-pass certification success rate is high with proper system design. The BF rating allows patient contact applications.

products.shortDescription: 200W medical power supply with high efficiency for fixed medical equipment
descriptionParagraphs: The RPS-200-24-C is a 200W medical power supply delivering 24V at 8.4A. It provides higher power for fixed medical equipment while maintaining medical safety standards.
With 93% efficiency and 4000VAC isolation, it offers reliable, efficient power for medical devices. The <100µA leakage current ensures patient safety.
BF rating and comprehensive certifications make it suitable for a wide range of medical applications. The 5-year warranty reflects high reliability standards.

faeReview.author: Dr. Sarah Liu
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - Medical Systems
faeReview.content: The RPS-200-24-C provides higher power for larger medical devices. The 93% efficiency reduces heat generation in equipment enclosures. I use these for ventilators, surgical equipment, and imaging systems. The BF rating and low leakage current are essential for patient safety. Good documentation package helps with FDA submissions. Reliable performance in critical care environments.

products.shortDescription: 90W medical power supply with higher output for medium-power medical devices
descriptionParagraphs: The GSM90A24-P1M is a 90W medical power supply delivering 24V at 3.75A. It offers higher power than GSM60 while maintaining the same compact form factor.
With 92% efficiency and full medical safety compliance, it's ideal for medium-power portable and fixed medical equipment. The 2xMOPP isolation ensures patient safety.
Universal input and wide temperature range support global deployment. Comprehensive safety certifications simplify regulatory approval processes.

faeReview.author: Dr. Sarah Liu
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - Medical Systems
faeReview.content: The GSM90A24-P1M bridges the gap between GSM60 and RPS series. The 90W output supports larger portable devices without jumping to the larger RPS form factor. Same excellent safety specifications as all GSM series. I use these for portable diagnostic equipment and medium-power therapy devices. The efficiency is excellent for the power level. Good thermal performance in compact enclosures.

products.shortDescription: 120W 12V medical power supply for devices requiring lower voltage operation
descriptionParagraphs: The RPS-120-12-C is a 120W medical power supply delivering 12V at 10A. It provides medical-grade power for devices requiring 12V operation.
With 92% efficiency and full IEC 60601-1 compliance, it ensures patient safety while delivering reliable power. The 10A output supports high-current 12V loads.
BF rating and <100µA leakage current make it suitable for patient contact applications. Comprehensive certifications support worldwide medical device deployment.

faeReview.author: Dr. Sarah Liu
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - Medical Systems
faeReview.content: The RPS-120-12-C provides medical-grade 12V power for devices that don't need 24V. The 10A output can drive substantial 12V loads. I use these for devices with 12V internal systems and for powering 12V peripherals in larger medical systems. Same excellent safety specifications as other RPS series. Good efficiency and thermal performance. The 12V option provides flexibility in system design.
